recoveredFrom: tool results and scrubbed evidence from the 2026-07-14 real-Editor authoring session that removed the player-visible third Shop card and republished P0/A/B
scrubbing: Only scrubbed, hash-only facts are recorded here: publicationIds, sha256 digests, booleans, run timestamps, canonical relative module names, scene names, and edit descriptors. No credentials, no account owner, and no absolute or home-directory paths. The raw session transcript (JSONL) is deliberately NOT committed.

evidenceLegend.reduced-tool-output: Only the launch/publish result flags survived in the recovered tool output; the per-run full hash-rich u5.phaser.provenance/1 file was written to a disposable scratch outside the repo and is no longer available. The launch flags below (result/deterministic/endpointDown/authStable/genStable) are the surviving facts.
evidenceLegend.full-hash-rich: The complete u5.phaser.provenance/1 record survives and is committed byte-for-byte alongside this file, independently sha256-verifiable.

acceptedValidation.note: Each publicationId above is byte-identical to authoring/publications/accepted.json roles p0/a/b; A != B.

p0.role: p0 — frozen-seed clean project BEFORE any edit

a.role: a — first accepted matched-edit bundle (menu.title live-copy/move)

b.role: b — distinct second accepted matched-edit bundle (menu.settings icon swap; U6 applies it twice)
